subject: Re: FW: Jeffrey's painting etc.
body:
have it picked up and brought to 71

--- Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> wrote:

>  
> 
> 
>  
>  
>  
>  
>  
> Lesley Groff
> Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
>  
> 
> -----Original Message-----
> From: Summer Claire Brennan [mailto:scb268@nyu.edu] 
> Sent: Thursday, June 29, 2006 8:59 AM
> To: Lesley Groff
> Subject: Jeffrey's painting etc.
> 
> Hi Lesley,
> 
> I hope all is well with you. I wanted to give
> Jeffrey a message about
> two things. The first is, this woman at a staffing
> agency took the
> liberty of looking up Jeffrey's office number to
> call him as a
> reference. I did not supply him as a reference and
> would not have done
> so without first speaking with him. She apologized
> to me for doing that
> and I just wanted to let Jeffrey know not to worry
> about calling her or
> anything, and, as I said, I did not give her the
> number or the ok to
> call. Also, I wanted to know if he would like his
> painting. I am going
> to visit my family in california but will be back on
> the 12th and really
> hope that he would still like me to give it to him.
> I put a LOT of work
> into it and I feel so sorry that it took so long.
> it's in a very
> realistic style and I was working with a concept
> that was perhaps, in
> the end, too complicated, I bit off more than I
> could chew! Anyways - as
> I said I hope that all is well with you, Jeffrey,
> and the rest of the
> office, and perhaps I'll be seeing you soon.
> 
> Best,
> Summer
>

body_html:
have it picked up and brought to 71

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein

-----Original Message-----
From: Summer Claire Brennan [mailto:scb268@nyu.edu]
Sent: Thursday, June 29, 2006 8:59 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Jeffrey's painting etc.

Hi Lesley,

I hope all is well with you. I wanted to give
Jeffrey a message about
two things. The first is, this woman at a staffing
agency took the
liberty of looking up Jeffrey's office number to
call him as a
reference. I did not supply him as a reference and
would not have done
so without first speaking with him. She apologized
to me for doing that
and I just wanted to let Jeffrey know not to worry
about calling her or
anything, and, as I said, I did not give her the
number or the ok to
call. Also, I wanted to know if he would like his
painting. I am going
to visit my family in california but will be back on
the 12th and really
hope that he would still like me to give it to him.
I put a LOT of work
into it and I feel so sorry that it took so long.
it's in a very
realistic style and I was working with a concept
that was perhaps, in
the end, too complicated, I bit off more than I
could chew! Anyways - as
I said I hope that all is well with you, Jeffrey,
and the rest of the
office, and perhaps I'll be seeing you soon.

Best,
Summer
